summary: Test suite provides solid coverage of core validator and formatter logic with well-designed fixtures and clear organization. However, significant gaps exist: (1) CLI argument parsing (--config, --warning-days, --format, --today) is untested; (2) Error handling paths (missing files, invalid JSON, bad format) have no unit tests; (3) Task requirement states 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' but only 1 test executes via act—the 28 unit tests run directly with bun test, violating the stated workflow execution requirement. Act integration test is valuable for end-to-end validation but is slow (3+ min), somewhat brittle (temp git setup, string-based output matching), and covers only one scenario. Missing: type validation, file I/O error scenarios, invalid date formats, boundary testing on input values. Formatter mock is hardcoded and would need manual updates if validator changes. Would catch regressions in core date logic and formatting but would miss CLI changes, error-handling regressions, and doesn't meet the architectural requirement of running all tests through the CI/CD pipeline.
